_instructions.slide_naming: slide-01.jpg, slide-02.jpg ... (exported from PowerPoint → File → Export → JPEG/PNG)
_instructions.pdf_support: Place a PDF as 'slides.pdf' in the slides folder for embedded PDF viewer

title: File Types & Extensions
subtitle: Recognize .doc, .jpg, .png, .xlsx
overview: This session helps students understand different file types and extensions used in real life such as documents, images, and spreadsheets.

images._note: Add screenshots of file icons, folders, and examples of documents and images.

gallery._placeholder: ADD: Screenshot of Word document file
gallery.caption: .doc file used for typing notes and letters

gallery._placeholder: ADD: Screenshot of JPG image file
gallery.caption: .jpg file stores photos from camera or mobile

gallery._placeholder: ADD: Screenshot of PNG image file
gallery.caption: .png file used for transparent images and logos

gallery._placeholder: ADD: Screenshot of Excel spreadsheet file
gallery.caption: .xlsx file used for marksheets and calculations

gallery._placeholder: ADD: Real life examples of files
gallery.caption: School notes, photos, and marksheets saved digitally

keyTopics: File — A digital item stored on a computer
Extension — Letters after the dot showing file type
.doc — Word document file for typing text
.jpg — Photo/image file from camera or mobile
.xlsx — Spreadsheet file for tables and calculations
File Icons — Help identify different file types quickly

youtubeVideos.title: Introduction to File Extensions
youtubeVideos.desc: Learn about different file types and extensions.

youtubeVideos.title: Understanding JPG PNG and DOC Files
youtubeVideos.desc: Simple explanation of common file formats.

activity.title: Identify File Extensions
steps: Open a folder containing different files
Double click each file to open it
Create a new folder and organize files

options: Letters after the dot in a file name
quiz.explanation: File extensions help identify the type of file.

quiz.q: Which extension is used for Word documents?
quiz.explanation: .doc files are used for text documents.

quiz.q: Which file type is commonly used for photos?
quiz.explanation: .jpg files are commonly used for photos.

quiz.q: Which file extension is used for spreadsheets?
quiz.explanation: .xlsx files are spreadsheet files used in Excel.

quiz.q: What is a PNG file mainly used for?
Which file type is used for calculations and tables?
quiz.explanation: Spreadsheet files help with calculations and tables.

quiz.q: Which extension belongs to an image file?

quiz.explanation: Word processor software opens document files.

quiz.q: What can file icons help us do?
quiz.explanation: Icons visually represent different file types.

quiz.q: Which extension is NOT an image file?
quiz.explanation: .xlsx is a spreadsheet file, not an image.

quiz.q: What is stored in a .doc file?
Where are photos from mobile phones usually saved?
quiz.explanation: Most mobile photos are saved as JPG files.

quiz.q: Which file type is useful for school marksheets?
quiz.explanation: Spreadsheet files are useful for marks and calculations.

options: They help computers know how to open files
quiz.explanation: Extensions tell the computer which program should open the file.
